# Neo.apps.ServiceWorker, Neo.examples.ServiceWorker

We should put the SW instances into apps & examples, to ensure that the dist folder gets ignored (since it will get own instances).

Sadly, it is not possible to use the `scope` in a way which points to examples or apps.
